title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Manipur (Courts) Act, 1955. (2) It extends to the whole of the 1 [Union territory of Manipur]. (3) It shall come into force on such date2 as the Chief Commissioner may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. Subs. by A.O. (No. 3), 1956 for "State of Manipur" (w.e.f. 1-3-1956). 2. 1st March, 1956, vide Chief Commissioner, Manipur's notification No. J/12/1956, dated 3rd February, 1956.
